title: Opening for Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
